This response is plain text and intentionally has no markdown heading marker.
It is also long enough that length alone cannot be used as the acceptance gate.
The provider must require a markdown heading before marking a documentation
variant as full fidelity. Otherwise a server-side error page, a plain changelog
fragment, or a search result dump could be misclassified as a complete source
capture. This fixture repeats that idea with enough prose to exceed the minimum
character threshold used by the ladder. The correct result is rejection from the
markdown/full route followed by the next ladder step.
